_doc: Innistrad: Double Feature (DBL) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/dbl.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Collation: sequential, MID/VOW split runs. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Special product combining every card from Innistrad: Midnight Hunt (MID) and Innistrad: Crimson Vow (VOW) except basic lands. Page does not state rarity composition counts (left null). 24 packs per box. Two rare slots (one per set). Printed in English in the USA.
